```{r echo=FALSE}
doc <- knitr::current_input()
doc <- gsub("\\..*", "", doc)
# needed when 'cache = TRUE'
if (!length(runtimes)) runtimes <- 0
new <- data.frame(doc, runtimes)
csv <- "_times.csv"
if (file.exists(csv)) {
    old <- read.csv(csv)
    # check if chapter already listed
    idx <- which(old[[1]] == doc)
    if (length(idx)) {
        # overwrite
        i <- head(idx, 1)-1
        j <- tail(idx, 1)+1
        a <- old[seq(i), ]
        b <- if (j <= nrow(old))
            old[seq(j, nrow(old)), ]
        new <- rbind(a, new, b)
    } else {
        # append
        new <- rbind(old, new)
    }
}
write.csv(new, csv, row.names=FALSE)
```
